mapper.select: SELECT bill_acc_no AS billAccNo ,bill_tgt_ym AS billTgtYm ,bill_item_cd AS billItemCd ,SUM(net_bill_amt) AS itemNpayAmt FROM bill_cnfm_info WHERE bill_acc_no = #{billAccNo} AND tgt_cont_no = #{tgtContNo} AND tgt_cont_div_cd = #{tgtContDivCd} AND cpay_sttus_cd = 'O' GROUP BY bill_acc_no, bill_tgt_ym, bill_item_cd ORDER BY bill_tgt_ym

SELECT bill_acc_no AS billAccNo ,bill_tgt_ym AS billTgtYm ,bill_item_cd AS billItemCd ,SUM(net_bill_amt) AS itemNpayAmt FROM bill_cnfm_info WHERE bill_acc_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT bill_acc_no FROM svc_cont_bill_acc_rltn_hst WHERE svc_cont_no = #{tgtContNo}) AND tgt_cont_no = #{tgtContNo} AND tgt_cont_div_cd = #{tgtContDivCd} AND cpay_sttus_cd = 'O' GROUP BY bill_acc_no, bill_tgt_ym, bill_item_cd ORDER BY bill_tgt_ym

SELECT bill_acc_no AS billAccNo ,bill_tgt_ym AS billTgtYm ,bill_item_cd AS billItemCd ,SUM(net_bill_amt) AS itemNpayAmt FROM bill_cnfm_info WHERE bill_acc_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT bill_acc_no FROM biz_cont_bill_acc_rltn_hst WHERE biz_cont_no = #{tgtContNo}) AND tgt_cont_no = #{tgtContNo} AND tgt_cont_div_cd = #{tgtContDivCd} AND cpay_sttus_cd = 'O' GROUP BY bill_acc_no, bill_tgt_ym, bill_item_cd ORDER BY bill_tgt_ym
